body.title: Retroactive: Granny dispatch.py full implementation
body.result: committed pre-existing 274-line granny dispatch.py rewrite under named ticket
body.intention: I intend that Granny dispatch.py pre-existing rewrite (CC dispatch + inference dispatch, 274 lines) is committed under a named ticket.
body.description:
Pre-existing uncommitted work: devices/granny/dispatch.py was rewritten from a thin re-exports shim to a full 274-line dispatch implementation (CC dispatch + inference dispatch paths). Found during T-devlab-schema-create sprint.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py
**Design rules:** external-state; no SQLite
**Scope boundary:** IN — commit the existing work as-is. OUT — no new functionality.
**Completion criteria:** git log shows dispatch.py committed; tests pass.
